executor_handoff.system_instructions: Short machine-oriented execution framing. Reinforce: - preserve existing patterns - follow clarified scope exactly - do not widen scope - use the chosen implementation path only

task_brief.why: Very short rationale so Executor understands intent.
task_brief.repo_signals: Relevant existing types, similar implementations, and current patterns being matched.
task_brief.implementation_path: Exactly one chosen path. No alternatives.
task_brief.code_level_guidance: State-flow notes, suggested API shape, tricky sequencing constraints.
